description: Reminder-CLEAR campaign: does clearing a DATED reminder REQUIRE the Shortcuts vector, or are there untested non-Shortcuts paths? The 'Shortcuts is the ONLY surface' copy (capability-matrix, oddity 2e, novel-paths #15) rests on URL in-place stickiness (R20/R21, solid) + AppleScript having no reminder property (solid for direct writes) — but leaves three indirect avenues unprobed. RC01/RC02 test the URL bounce-via-today-then-re-date SEQUENCE (the guard's own recommended workaround, never verified end-to-end). RC03 measures reminderTime after an AppleScript move-to-Inbox de-schedule (E06 asserted start/startDate but never recorded reminderTime). Avenue C (AppleScript json-property write) and avenue D (Shortcuts clear-on-a-PROJECT) are handled outside this JSON harness — see docs/lab/rc-suite-results.md. Codec refs from r-suite: 15:00 dated reminder = reminderTime 1006632960; startDate 2026-07-09 = 132805760; 2026-07-10 = 132805888.

probes.title: URL bounce leg 1: a DATED item with a DATED reminder, updated with a bare when=today keyword — does the keyword-clear (R07) win, or the dated-sticky carry (R20/R21)? CRUX of avenue B.

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='RC-BOUNCE' AND start=2 AND startDate=132805760 AND reminderTime=1006632960

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='RC-BOUNCE' AND start=1

probes.title: URL bounce leg 2: re-date the just-cleared item back to its original date (when=2026-07-09) — does it stay cleared (bounce SUCCEEDS as a pure-URL dated clear), or does a reminder re-attach? Completes avenue B end-to-end.

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='RC-BOUNCE' AND startDate=132805760

probes.title: AppleScript de-schedule side-effect on reminderTime: a DATED item with a DATED reminder, moved to Inbox via `move ... to list "Inbox"` (E06). E06 proved start=0/startDate NULL but NEVER recorded reminderTime — does the reminder DROP when the date it hangs on is removed? Avenue A.

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='RC-ASINBOX' AND start=2 AND startDate=132805760 AND reminderTime=1006632960

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to move to do id "{uuid:RC-ASINBOX}" to list "Inbox"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='RC-ASINBOX' AND start=0
